description: A student wants to know the operating hours for the campus writing center.

nodes.task_description: Identify the specific tutoring center the student is asking about.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the student means the 'Writing Center'.

nodes.task_description: Look up the hours for the Writing Center on the university website or internal knowledge base.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the hours are M-F, 9 AM - 5 PM.

nodes.task_description: Communicate the hours to the student and ask if they need to schedule an appointment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the information and offers further assistance.
